017package org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
020import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.*;
021import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile.*;
022
023/**
024 * Petstore React SPA demo — serves the no-build single-page React UI from the core classpath.
025 *
026 * <p>
027 * Composes {@link StaticFilesMixin} to serve {@code /static/*} from the importer's classpath: the file
028 * {@code static/petstore-ui.html} is reachable at {@code GET /petstore-ui/static/petstore-ui.html}.  The HTML
029 * loads React + Babel and uses {@code fetch()} against {@code /petstore/pets} to demonstrate the headless-JSON +
030 * decoupled-SPA pattern alongside the server-rendered HTML-doc UI.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * Lives in {@code juneau-petstore-core} so both the Jetty and Spring Boot deployments inherit it for free.
034 *
035 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
036 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauPetstoreOverview">juneau-petstore</a>
037 * </ul>
038 */
039@Rest(
040   path="/petstore-ui",
041   title="Petstore — React SPA demo",
042   description="No-build single-page React UI loaded as static classpath resource; calls /petstore/* over fetch().",
043   mixins=StaticFilesMixin.class
044)
045@SuppressWarnings({
046   "java:S110" // Inheritance depth acceptable for example/demo code
047})
048public class PetstoreUiResource extends BasicRestServlet {
049
050   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
051}
